speaker: speaker1
text: Really ? Did you find any information about a new job ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yeah , I just got some good information off the internet .

speaker: speaker1
text: Great ! Do you think you have a chance at getting the job ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I didn ’ t just find out about one job . There were several ones that looked good .

speaker: speaker1
text: Maybe I should try looking on the web for work .

speaker: speaker2
text: Sure you have to be patient . But I think it ’ s much less trouble to sit in front of a computer than to go door to door or to make a lot of phone calls .

speaker: speaker1
text: But there must be so many people who also see the advertisement for that job on the net . You might have no chance .

speaker: speaker2
text: How do you know if you don ’ t have a try ?
